details: NO CLEAN SIDE-ON PHOTO FOUND. 2024 rebrand to 100% electric-assist PBSC FIT bikes; only the empty dock was photographed. Frame color inferred from PBSC silver/aluminium platform; CapMetro brand teal (#1ca9c9) used as accent. VERIFY.

Solid blue step-through frame, white front + rear fenders, white curved rear skirt-guard with blue 'bergenbysykkel.no' + logo. No front basket. Black saddle, black tyres, silver spokes. Same platform as Oslo/Trondheim.
Bright blue frame + blue fenders. Wide front bucket basket with a curved skirt showing a teal-to-blue gradient, 'MASSACHUSETTS' + blue-cross health logo. 'BLUEbikes' wordmark on frame. Black saddle.

Ocean-blue frame with lime-green 'CHATTANOOGA' wordmark and bright lime rear skirt-guard ('Blue Cross Blue Shield of Tennessee'). Black wire front basket, 'Outdoor Chattanooga' on downtube. Black saddle, silver crank.
'Chicago blue' (light cyan) one-piece frame + fenders. 'DIVVY' black wordmark with black/white chevrons. Front rack/tray with bungee cord (not a full basket). Black tyres, silver spokes.
Gloss-black frame. 'CoGo' logo ('Co' white, 'Go' red #e4322b), 'COLUMBUS' white on downtube. Black wire front basket, teal-green rear ad skirt ('Medical Mutual'). Black saddle, silver rims.
